abstract: This workshop proceedings consists of the following: executive summary; inaugural address; objectives and structure of the workshop; Thanh Ha Watershed, Vietnam; Tad Fa Watershed, Thailand; micro-watersheds at Ringnodia and college of agriculture, Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India; Lalatora Watershed, Madhya Pradesh, India; Watershed at Indian Institute of Social Science, Bhopal, Madhaya Pradesh, India; Integrated management of BW7 watershed in vertic inceptisols at ICRISAT, Patancheru, India; integrated management of Adarsa watershed, Kothapally, Andhra Pradesh, India; observations and suggestions by Gupta, R.K., Viet, N.V., Toomsaen, B., Lusanandana, C., Pande, A.B., Raverker, K.P.; evaluation of benchmark watersheds. The appendix contains a questionnaire : evaluation of watersheds at different locations by different scientists
institution: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
publisher: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
note: This workshop was organized with the active support of several organization /institutions. Some of the notable ones are: Central Research Institution for Dryland Agriculture (CRIDA); Jawaharlal Nehru Krishi Vishwa Vidyalaya(JNKVV); Indian Institute of Soil Science(IISS); BAIF Research Foundation(BAIF), Khon Kaen University(KKU) Royal Thai Department of Agriculture; And Vietnam Agricultural Science Institute(VASI)……….
title: Improving management of natural resources for sustainable rainfed agriculture: proceedings of the traveling workshop-cum-field visit to benchmark watersheds, 27 Aug - 12 Sep 2000
